title: conyza oxyodonta
intro: Conyza oxyodonta, also known as the Mexican fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family and is native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Conyza oxyodonta include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Conyza oxyodonta can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
